body_txt: Fingers. You've got four on each hand, plus thumbs. And the knuckles make a pretty good place to leave a tattoo. Ideally, a four-letter word. Maybe a second one on the other hand. Typical to the Tattooed Crook , as tattoos are an Evolving Trope , and simple shoulder tattoos have gone mainstream. Compare Good Scars, Evil Scars . And no, a tattoo of Knuckles doesn't count (unless it's on the literal knuckles).
